nasb.text: Say to them, ‘Thus says the Lord God, “Behold, I will take the sons of Israel from among the nations where they have gone, and I will gather them from every side and bring them into their own land;

esv.text: then say to them, Thus says the Lord God: Behold, I will take the people of Israel from the nations among which they have gone, and will gather them from all around, and bring them to their own land.

cnv.text: 你要對他們說：‘主耶和華這樣說：看哪！我要把以色列人從他們所到的列國中領出來，又從四圍聚集他們，把他們領回故土。

ccb.text: 告诉他们，主耶和华这样说，‘我要把以色列的百姓从他们分散的各国招聚起来，领他们回归故土。
